message:
feat(wal,pager): split WAL frame append into prepare/commit phases

Move frame serialization (header layout, payload copy) out of the
EXCLUSIVE-lock window by introducing a two-phase WAL append path:

1. `prepare_frame_bytes` / `prepare_append_frames` builds the
   contiguous frame buffer before the lock is acquired.
2. `append_prepared_frame_bytes` / `append_prepared_frames` finalizes
   only the rolling checksum chain and issues the single write syscall
   under the lock.

This narrows the publish window to checksum finalization + write + sync,
which is the minimum serialized surface required for WAL correctness.

Key changes:
- traits.rs: Add `PreparedWalFrameBatch`, `PreparedWalFrameMeta` types
  and default trait methods `prepare_append_frames` /
  `append_prepared_frames` on `WalBackend`.
- wal.rs: Factor `append_frames` into `prepare_frame_bytes` +
  `append_prepared_frame_bytes`; add reusable `frame_scratch` buffer.
- wal_adapter.rs: Implement both prepare and append-prepared paths on
  `WalBackendAdapter`, including FEC hook integration.
- pager.rs: Call the two-phase path in `commit_wal`, falling back to
  `append_frames` when prepare returns `None`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
